title: Can we pull a text from one of the board to a widget?
excerpt: We are using boards to add our project plans. And we are creating a dashboard to pull the reports from different boards. We are using different widgets to get this report from boards. But is there a widget through which …

posts.author: alexj94 (Abhinand)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using boards to add our project plans. And we are creating a dashboard to pull the reports from different boards. We are using different widgets to get this report from boards. But is there a widget through which we can bring a text field from the boards to the main dashboard?
